intro: Tilt the course sink the putt
description:
Guide a rolling ball across floating courses high above the clouds in this relaxing yet skillful challenge. By tilting the floor, you control the direction of the ball as it rolls across compact platformed holes designed to fit right on your screen. Carefully navigate corners, gaps, and hazards to reach the flag-marked hole while aiming to beat PAR and earn all three stars.

Precision matters. One wrong tilt can send the ball off the edge or straight into spikes, forcing you to try again. With unlimited attempts you can keep experimenting, but using too many balls will cost you those perfect star ratings.

Some courses add extra twists with jumps, springboards, and elevated platforms that launch the ball over gaps or up to higher paths. Each level becomes a small puzzle of balance, timing, and control.

There are 30 floating courses to conquer, and coins scattered across them reward careful play. Collect enough to unlock new skins and customize the look of your ball as you roll toward victory.
